---
title: "Arthur William Crawley Boevey"
---

## Arthur William Crawley Boevey

**Dates:** 1845-1913

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

The son of Sir Martin Crawley Boevey, 4th Bt., who was CMY\'s second cousin, he published a biography, <i>The Perverse Widow</i>, of Catharina (Riches) Boevey (1670-1726), to whose husband they were related.  He was the brother of Sybella Crawley Boevey.

### Letters

- Letter from March 31st [1897?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
